nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 瓦亞加河
nodes.summary: 瓦亞加河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Maroon-tailed parakeet、Bluish-slate antshrike、北方藍灰蟻鵙等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Endemic Bird Area
nodes.summary: Endemic Bird Area是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括White-winged tapaculo、Satin berrypecker、Black-headed tailorbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: White-winged tapaculo
nodes.summary: White-winged tapaculo（White-winged tapaculo，学名 Scytalopus krabbei），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于瓦亞加河、Endemic Bird Area，常见栖息地包括山地森林、稀树草原。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is likely also present in the remote and poorly-explored region north of Río Huallaga along the eastern slope of the Andes. It inhabits wet shrub forest and montane forest, but might prefer shrub-line vegetation interspersed with open tussock grassland in areas where it occurs alongside Tschudi's tapaculo

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is a restricted-range species and only occurs in mountain ranges within the North-east Peruvian cordilleras Endemic Bird Area, which is relatively unthreatened

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is known only from north-central Peru, where it inhabits wet shrub forest and montane forest

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is likely also present in the remote and poorly-explored region north of Río Huallaga along the eastern slope of the Andes. It inhabits wet shrub forest and montane forest, but might prefer shrub-line vegetation interspersed with open tussock grassland in areas where it occurs alongside Tschudi's tapaculo
